mapper.sql: id, orderno, openid, packageid, phone, price, order_status as orderStatus, lng, lat, address, modify_time as modifyTime, create_time as createTime, name, preImgs, aftImgs

a.id, a.orderno, a.openid, a.packageid, a.phone, a.price, a.order_status as orderStatus, a.name, a.preImgs, a.aftImgs , a.lng, a.lat, a.address, a.modify_time as modifyTime, a.create_time as createTime, b.package_name as packageName, b.img, b.detail, b.prePrice, d.name as repaireName, d.phone as repairePhone
